nasb.text: So He brought me there; and behold, there was a man whose appearance was like the appearance of bronze, with a line of flax and a measuring rod in his hand; and he was standing in the gateway.

esv.text: When he brought me there, behold, there was a man whose appearance was like bronze, with a linen cord and a measuring reed in his hand. And he was standing in the gateway.

cnv.text: 他把我帶到那裡，我見有一個人，他看來像銅，手裡拿著麻繩和測量竿，站在門口。

ccb.text: 祂把我带到那里。城的入口站着一个面色如铜的人，手中拿着一条麻绳和一根量竿。
